inputs.label: Cohesion (c)
inputs.businessContext: Soil cohesion intercept, typically from 0 for sands to 150 kPa for hard clay.

businessContext_i18n.en: Soil cohesion intercept, typically from 0 for sands to 150 kPa for hard clay.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zemin kohezyon kesme dayanımı, kumlar için 0'dan sert kil için 150 kPa'a kadar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kohäsionsbeiwert des Bodens, typischerweise von 0 für Sande bis 150 kPa für harten Ton.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cohésion du sol, typiquement de 0 pour les sables à 150 kPa pour l'argile dure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cohesión del suelo, típicamente de 0 para arenas a 150 kPa para arcilla dura.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تماسك التربة، عادة من 0 للرمال إلى 150 كيلوباسكال للطين الصلب.

inputs.label: Angle of Internal Friction (φ)
inputs.businessContext: Effective friction angle of soil. Common range 20-45°.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective friction angle of soil. Common range 20-45°.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zeminin efektif sürtünme açısı. Yaygın aralık 20-45°.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektiver Reibungswinkel des Bodens. Üblicher Bereich 20-45°.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de frottement effectif du sol. Plage courante 20-45°.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de fricción efectivo del suelo. Rango común 20-45°.
businessContext_i18n.ar: زاوية احتكاك فعالة للتربة. النطاق الشائع 20-45°.

inputs.label: Unit Weight of Soil (γ)
inputs.businessContext: From 14 kN/m³ for soft clays to 22 kN/m³ for dense sand/gravel.

businessContext_i18n.en: From 14 kN/m³ for soft clays to 22 kN/m³ for dense sand/gravel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yumuşak killer için 14 kN/m³'ten yoğun kum/çakıl için 22 kN/m³'e kadar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Von 14 kN/m³ für weiche Tone bis 22 kN/m³ für dichten Sand/Kies.
businessContext_i18n.fr: De 14 kN/m³ pour les argiles molles à 22 kN/m³ pour le sable/gravier dense.
businessContext_i18n.es: De 14 kN/m³ para arcillas blandas a 22 kN/m³ para arena/grava densa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: من 14 كيلونيوتن/م³ للطين الناعم إلى 22 كيلونيوتن/م³ للرمل/الحصى الكثيف.

inputs.label: Depth of Foundation (Df)
inputs.businessContext: Depth of footing base below ground surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of footing base below ground surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel tabanının zemin yüzeyinin altındaki derinliği.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur de la base de la semelle sous la surface du sol.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad de la base del cimiento bajo la superficie del terreno.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عمق قاعدة الأساس تحت سطح الأرض.

inputs.label: Width of Foundation (B)
inputs.businessContext: Width of continuous strip footing, or equivalent diameter of circular footing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of continuous strip footing, or equivalent diameter of circular footing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürekli şerit temelin genişliği veya dairesel temelin eşdeğer çapı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite eines Streifenfundaments oder äquivalenter Durchmesser eines Kreisfundaments.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur d'une semelle filante, ou diamètre équivalent d'une semelle circulaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de zapata corrida, o diámetro equivalente de zapata circular.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عرض الأساس الشريطي المستمر، أو القطر المكافئ للأساس الدائري.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (FS)
inputs.businessContext: Factor of safety typically 2.5–4 for permanent structures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor of safety typically 2.5–4 for permanent structures.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalıcı yapılar için tipik olarak 2,5–4 arası güvenlik faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de sécurité typiquement 2,5–4 pour les structures permanentes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad típicamente 2.5–4 para estructuras permanentes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Friction angle must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
